build: V60.3.12 TrustMap PNG Asset Integration and Interaction Recovery
rule: These PNG assets are the visual source of truth for the CyberShield TrustMap core and Layer 1 trust-domain visuals. The base TrustMap renderer owns pan, drag, wheel zoom, +/- zoom, Fit Map, Kernel View, Domain View, and Object View.
interaction_requirements: Layer 1 PNG assets replace only .v554-domain .orb content
CyberShield Trust Kernel PNG replaces only .v554-kernel content
Do not override #v554World transform in CSS
Base TrustMap renderer must own pan, drag, wheel zoom, +/- zoom, and view modes
Layer 1 hover, focus, and selected states must show neon circular selection rings
Pan X, Pan Y, and Zoom sliders must control the same base TrustMap movement system, not create a second transform system
